entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop (Cajanus cajan) evaluated for yield and yield contributing characters.

entities.name: CROSSING PROGRAMME
entities.description: A breeding process used to produce 27 hybrids in L×T fashion.

entities.name: KHARIF
entities.description: The monsoon cropping season during which the study was conducted.

entities.name: RANDOMIZED BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design used for planting and evaluating parents and hybrids.

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A morphological character measured to evaluate performance.

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: A phenological character measuring the time to reach 50% flowering.

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: A phenological character measuring the time to reach maturity.

entities.name: NUMBER OF PRIMARY BRANCHES PER PLANT
entities.description: A yield contributing character measuring primary branching.

entities.name: NUMBER OF SECONDARY BRANCHES PER PLANT
entities.description: A yield contributing character measuring secondary branching.

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: A yield contributing character that directly impacts overall yield.

entities.name: NUMBER OF SEEDS PER POD
entities.description: A yield contributing character measuring seed count per pod.

entities.name: 100 SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: A trait measuring the weight of 100 seeds.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The primary performance metric measuring the amount of grain produced per plant.

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: A ratio of grain yield to total biomass.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The overall productivity of the crop.

entities.name: HYBRIDS
entities.description: Offspring produced from the crossing of twelve parents.

relationships.target: NUMBER OF PRIMARY BRANCHES PER PLANT
NUMBER OF SECONDARY BRANCHES PER PLANT
